_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality dimensions and how to assess, measure, and document quality issues within a specific data domain.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Knowledge DQ-K-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.549), DQ-T-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.660). Shared vocabulary: [document, quality]. NICE-only terms [standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [assess, data, dimensions, domain, issues, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.904, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the NICE element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (92.2%). The model interprets "Document quality standards" as logically implying aspects of "Knowledge of data quality dimensions and how to assess, measure, and document qu" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.665 ≈ STS 0.660 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [document, quality] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [document, quality]. NICE-only: [standards]. WIDAI-only: [assess, data, dimensions, domain, issues, knowledge].
